Package
Description
com.societegenerale.failover.core.expiry
Expiry policy and extractor abstractions for controlling cached payload lifetime.

    Method
    Description
    static <T> ExpiryPolicyContractVerifier<T>

    Starts a verification for the given policy.
    ExpiryPolicyContractVerifier<T>
    ExpiryPolicyContractVerifier.withFailover(Failover failover)

    ExpiryPolicyContractVerifier<T>
    ExpiryPolicyContractVerifier.withSamplePayload(T samplePayload)
    A representative payload instance stored in the synthetic ReferentialPayload used for the checks.
